creator: nq1n407ba@disabled.account.local
text:
I am running FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 and just compiled net-p2p/transmission-daemon 2.92. When I try to install it, it fails with the following error:

% sudo pkg install transmission-daemon-2.92
Updating Poudriere repository catalogue...
Poudriere repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
The following 1 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	transmission-daemon: 2.92

Number of packages to be installed: 1

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
[1/1] Installing transmission-daemon-2.92...
===> Creating groups.
Using existing group 'transmission'.
===> Creating users
Creating user 'transmission' with uid '921'.
pw: user 'transmission' disappeared during update
install: unknown user transmission
pkg: PRE-INSTALL script failed
